hooks.command: input=$(cat); cmd=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.tool_input.command // ""'); if echo "$cmd" | grep -qE '^git push'; then branch=$(git rev-parse --abbrev-ref HEAD 2>/dev/null); if [ "$branch" = "main" ] || [ "$branch" = "master" ]; then printf '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PreToolUse","permissionDecision":"deny","permissionDecisionReason":"Direct push to main/master is blocked. Use a feature branch and open a PR instead."}}'; fi; fi

input=$(cat); cmd=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.tool_input.command // ""'); if echo "$cmd" | grep -qE '^git (add|commit)'; then staged=$(git diff --cached --name-only 2>/dev/null); has_migration=$(echo "$staged" | grep -E 'migrations/|[.]sql$' | head -1); has_code=$(echo "$staged" | grep -vE 'migrations/|[.]sql$|backup/' | grep -E '[.](go|ts|tsx|js|jsx)$' | head -1); if [ -n "$has_migration" ] && [ -n "$has_code" ]; then printf '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PreToolUse","permissionDecision":"deny","permissionDecisionReason":"Migration files must be isolated in their own PR. Staged files mix migrations and app code. Unstage one group and commit them separately."}}'; fi; fi
